title: Ayayayayo Aananthamey Lyrics Kumki Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Aditi Paul & Karthik (Violin)
MOvie: Kumki
Music: D Immman
Lyricist: Yugabharathi		 Other Songs Lyrics
Soi Soi Soi SoiA lady with violin (ayayyayyo female)Ayayayoo AananthameyOnnum PuriyalaNee eppo pullaSollitaaley Ava KaadhalaYella Oorum
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Ayayayayo aanandhame
nenjukullae arambambamae

Nooru kodi vaanavil
maari maari seruthe
kaadhal podum thooralil
thegam moozhgi pogudhe

Yedho oru aasai,va va kathai pesa
Ayayayayayo..

Solla ninaipathai solli mudithida
illai illai thunichal
Nenjil irupathai kangal uraipathu
romba romba kuraichal

Oru keni pola aasa ooruthe
Maruthaani pola thegam maaruthe

Pakkathil vanthathu paasam
ini vetkangal enbathu vesam
uyire urave unathe..

yelo yelo yelo yelo
yelalangadi yelo yelo
yelo yelo yelo yelo
yelo yelalangadi yelo yelohh ...

Jenmam muzhuvathum unthan vizhigalil
thangi kolla varava
Unnai vida oru nalla manithanai
kandathillai thalaiva
kadivaalam yethum kaadhal odave
kidaiyathu tholvi naamum serave

Munnuku vanthathu mogam
sila muthangal thanthidu pothum
udane varuve sugame...

Ayayayayo aanandhame
nenjukullae arambambamae

 English Translation
I tried my best :)
oh my god!! what’s this joy?
that started from my heart.

100 crore rainbow’s are
joining together.
Love rain
submerges the body.

just one desire,come to me to talk
oh my god!!

No guts to tell
what we think.
its very very less that
eyes can tell our heart.

desire grows like a well
body color changes like henna plant

love came near me
now shyness is a drama
my soul, my relation..its for you.

yelo yelo yelo yelo
yelalangadi yelo yelo
yelo yelo yelo yelo
yelo yelalangadi yelo yelohh …

for my entire life,
shall i come to stay in your eyes
didnt see any good human
like you, my man
love goes without a bridle
but no lose when I join you

infatuation is left now
just give some kisses
right now..come ..its joy

oh my god!! what’s this joy?
that started from my heart.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ayayayayo Aananthamey?

The song expresses feelings of love and joy, capturing the essence of romantic moments.

In which movie is Ayayayayo Aananthamey featured?

This song is featured in the movie Kumki.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song is sung by Aditi Paul and features music by D Imman and lyrics by Yugabharathi.

When was Ayayayayo Aananthamey released?

The song was released on July 30, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ayayayayo Aananthamey, the characters in Kumki experience a beautiful moment of love and connection. The song's soothing melody and romantic lyrics evoke feelings of joy and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate scenes. It captures the essence of young love, celebrating the blissful emotions that come with it. Through Aditi Paul's captivating voice, the song conveys a sense of happiness and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ayayayayo Aananthamey from Kumki is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. With Aditi Paul's enchanting vocals and D Imman's captivating music, this song creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with love. Experience the heartfelt lyrics by Yugabharathi that beautifully express the emotions of longing and happiness.
stanzaMeanings: Oh my god!! what’s this joy? that started from my heart. 100 crore rainbows are joining together. Love rain submerges the body. Just one desire, come to me to talk oh my god!! No guts to tell what we think. It's very very less that eyes can tell our heart. Desire grows like a well, body color changes like henna plant. Love came near me now, shyness is a drama, my soul, my relation.. it's for you.
